name: Hearty Vegetable Broth
recipeIngredient: 4 large Carrots; scrubbed and thinly sliced
2 large Potatoes; scrubbed and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large soup pot.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce the heat and cover the pot.
4. Simmer low for 3 to 4 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into another container.
6. Discard the vegetables used in making the broth.
7. Let cool before storing in freezer-safe containers (1-2 cups each) for up to one month.
